name: Partner Referrals
description:
Use the Partner Referrals API to add PayPal seller accounts to PayPal Complete Payments Platform for Marketplaces and Platforms.
Important: This endpoint is available to approved partners only. Fill out this form to get approved and a PayPal representative will reach out to you shortly.
For more information about partner integrations and onboarding sellers, see PayPal Complete Payments Platform for Marketplaces and Platforms.
